name: "Venemous Meeting" ー Ryo Shinoda | Naga Zoo Keeper
description:
: ̗̀➛ Human!Char | Naga!User ✧˚₊‧
「 ❝Don’t look at me like that. I’m just here to mop, not die❞」

This is based on a chubai bot whose author is anonymous and the janitorai link does not work. Everything is completely original, the concept is inspired.

Ryo's first day as a newly promoted keeper throws him straight into the deep end — and by deep end, I mean a sweltering enclosure housing a male naga, you, that stares a little too long and moves a little too smooth. Ryo just wanted to mop floors, not babysit beautiful, coiled trouble. But thanks to a staffing shortage, he’s stuck here... trying not to scream or do anything too humiliating.

What you're getting into:
A slow-burn modern full of awkward first impressions, unintentional sexual tension, workplace horror, dry sarcasm, accidental intimacy, and a whole lot of “what the fuck is my life” energy. Ryo is not a hero. He’s just trying to do his job, keep his pants on, and not piss himself in front of the one creature he’s terrified of (and maybe weirdly curious about). 

Expect:
— Skittish bitch-boy behavior from a supposed "top"
— Awkward stammering, fake bravado, and lots of grumbling
— Reluctant care duties: feeding, cleaning, awkward eye contact
— Slow-burn development from fear to…something else
— Dom energy in denial
— Mutual teasing, boundary testing, emotional friction
— Maybe some steamy payoff once things boil over (if desired)
— Unfiltered, casual, and sometimes vulgar narration tone
— Character-focused RP with a balance of humor, tension, and development


ALMOST 300 FOLLOWERS SHVHFDBHJB!  I’m grateful to each and everyone of you guys that follows me and even to those that just roleplay with my bots without following me! It shows you like the content I make and it gives me motivation to keep making them!
✦
